response.justification: Bogdan meets the minimum requirement of 15 years in software engineering and holds a strong entrepreneurial and full-stack background. However, the role requires a Director-level individual contributor with recognized expertise in AI strategy and machine learning, whereas Bogdan's experience is primarily at the Senior/Staff full-stack level with only recent, limited exposure to AI tooling.
strengths: Over 15 years of diverse software engineering experience across web, mobile, and infrastructure.
Demonstrated entrepreneurial initiative as the founder of GISCollective.
Recent hands-on experience with AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tooling.
concerns: Lacks the deep, recognized artificial intelligence and machine learning expertise central to the role.
Experience aligns more with a Staff Full-Stack Engineer than a Director-level AI Strategy Principal.
Limited evidence of advising strategic enterprise customers on cloud and AI technology adoption.
